notes: Phase 4/5 (Icecrown Citadel 25 Heroic + The Ruby Sanctum) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins WotLK Classic Restoration Shaman gear guide (anchor phase-5-best-in-slot-table). Tier set: Sanctified Frost Witch's line. Weapon lists the legendary Val'anyr, Hammer of Ancient Kings (Ulduar) as top pick over the guaranteed ICC drop. Rings/Trinkets split into two named slots with the top pick in slot 1.
